examples: Octavius awaits me in his chariot.
My beauty alone remained, and Octavius' scorn did more to vanquish me than the sword of the Romans.
Ocky White derived its name from locals who shortened the name of founder Octavius White.
The family, which still owns much of Mayfair and Belgravia, gave the lease of the site to Albert Octavius Edwards, who built the luxury hotel.
